blocks.body: Present Simple: Forms and Use — V1, he/she/it + s/es, nawyki, fakty i regularne czynności.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W Present Simple używamy V1 z I / you / we / they i dodajemy -s / -es z he / she / it.","rules":[{"label":"I / You / We / They + V1","color":"emerald","text":"Z tymi podmiotami używaj podstawowej formy czasownika.","example":"I work. / They live here."},{"label":"He / She / It + V-s / -es","color":"blue","text":"W trzeciej osobie liczby pojedynczej zwykle dodajemy -s albo -es.","example":"She works. / He watches TV."},{"label":"Main use","color":"amber","text":"Używaj tego czasu do mówienia o nawykach, faktach i czynnościach regularnych.","example":"We study every day. / Water boils at 100°C."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowy wzór","intro":"Zapamiętaj dwa główne schematy.","items":[{"label":"I / You / We / They","title":"V1","subtitle":"I work. / You play. / We live here."},{"label":"He / She / It","title":"V-s / -es","subtitle":"He works. / She plays. / It rains a lot."},{"label":"-es forms","title":"goes / watches / finishes","subtitle":"Po go, watch, finish i podobnych czasownikach często dodajemy -es."},{"label":"Spelling","title":"study → studies","subtitle":"Jeśli czasownik kończy się na spółgłoska + y, piszemy -ies."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy używamy Present Simple","sections":[{"label":"Nawyki","color":"emerald","description":"Mów o tym, co robisz regularnie każdego dnia, tygodnia albo zazwyczaj.","examples":[{"en":"I drink tea every morning.","ua":"Piję herbatę każdego ranka."},{"en":"She walks to school.","ua":"Ona chodzi do szkoły pieszo."}]},{"label":"Fakty","color":"blue","description":"Używaj tego czasu do prostych faktów i ogólnych prawd.","examples":[{"en":"The sun rises in the east.","ua":"Słońce wschodzi na wschodzie."},{"en":"My brother lives in Kyiv.","ua":"Mój brat mieszka w Kijowie."}]},{"label":"Czynności powtarzalne","color":"amber","description":"Pokazuj działania, które wracają jako część planu albo rutyny.","examples":[{"en":"The bus leaves at eight.","ua":"Autobus odjeżdża o ósmej."},{"en":"We have English on Mondays.","ua":"Mamy angielski w poniedziałki."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szybkie porównanie form","intro":"Zobacz, jak zmienia się czasownik przy różnych podmiotach.","rows":[{"en":"I work every day.","ua":"forma podstawowa V1","note":"I + work"},{"en":"You work every day.","ua":"forma podstawowa V1","note":"You + work"},{"en":"He works every day.","ua":"dodajemy -s","note":"He + works"},{"en":"She watches TV in the evening.","ua":"dodajemy -es","note":"She + watches"}],"warning":"Nie mów he work ani I goes."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Pomijanie -s przy he / she / it.","wrong":"❌ He play football after school.","right":"✅ He plays football after school."},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Dodawanie -s przy I / you / we / they.","wrong":"❌ I goes to work at eight.","right":"✅ I go to work at eight."},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Zapominanie o zmianie pisowni przy -y.","wrong":"❌ She study English on Mondays.","right":"✅ She studies English on Mondays."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Z I / you / we / they używaj V1.","Przy he / she / it zwykle dodaj -s / -es.","Present Simple służy do mówienia o nawykach, faktach i regularnych czynnościach.","Po spółgłosce + y często mamy -ies: study → studies.","Typowy błąd to he work zamiast he works."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Present Simple","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-forms","current":true},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-questions","current":false},{"label":"Adverbs of Frequency","url":"/pl/theory/present-simple/present-simple-adverbs-of-frequency","current":false}]}
